title: jasminum coarctatum
intro: Jasminum coarctatum, also known as the yellow jasmine or star jasmine, is a flowering plant native to Australia and New Zealand. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Jasminum coarctatum include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and soothe digestive problems. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
